issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. Card text says '[End of Your Turn]' which is an automatic trigger, not a player-activated ability.

First action is Rest, but card text says 'You may rest this Character' as a condition for the effect, not the primary action. The primary action is 'Set up to 1 of your {FILM} type Characters other than [Bartolomeo] as active'.

Action is 'GiveKeyword' with 'Blocker', but card effect has nothing to do with Blocker keyword. The action should set a Character as 'active' (likely a Rest/Un-rest mechanic), and should target {FILM} type Characters other than Bartolomeo.
Target filter 'maxCost:2' is not present in card text. Should filter for {FILM} type Characters and exclude Bartolomeo by name.
Missing optional clause: card says 'You may' indicating this is optional, not mandatory.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [End of Your Turn] You may rest this Character: Set up to 1 of your {FILM} type Characters other than [Bartolomeo] as active.
